hero.title: Dr Silvia Mendes Practice
hero.subtitle: Ophthalmology - Quality Eye Care
hero.intro: Specialized practice offering comprehensive and personalized care for your eye health.

about.title: About
about.text1: Dr Silvia Mendes is an ophthalmologist at CHC Hospital in Liège, specializing in comprehensive eye care. With a patient-centric approach, she offers accurate diagnoses and cutting-edge treatments.
about.text2: The practice is equipped with the latest technologies to ensure optimal monitoring of your visual health.

services.title: Our Services
services.examsText: Diagnosis and monitoring for the whole family. Vision disorder screening.
services.cataractText: Modern and safe surgical techniques to restore clear vision.
services.glaucomaText: Early screening, regular monitoring, and tailored treatment for every stage.
services.retinaText: Management of AMD, diabetic retinopathy, and other conditions.
services.pediatricText: Specialized consultations for children from an early age.

appointment.title: Book an Appointment
appointment.intro: Select your preferred date and time below. You will receive a confirmation by email and SMS.
appointment.emergencyText: For eye emergencies, please contact CHC emergency department directly or call 112.
appointment.help: If you experience any issues, contact us at
